meta.title: Nikola Vaptsarov Naval Academy
meta.description: Nikola Vaptsarov Naval Academy — Bulgaria's oldest technical educational institution, founded in 1881.

quickAccess.applyDesc: Online admissions for bachelor's, master's and cadet programs
quickAccess.coursesDesc: 60+ maritime, IT and language qualification courses

about.label: About the Academy
about.title: Bulgaria's Oldest Technical Educational Institution
about.description: Nikola Vaptsarov Naval Academy traces maritime education traditions to 1881, when the Naval School opened as the country's first technical institution for training engineers and sailors.
about.description2: The academy prepares highly qualified specialists and leaders for the Armed Forces, national security, and the economy. Curricula comply with international requirements for preparing naval officers and maritime industry specialists.

programs.label: Training
programs.title: Programs & Specialties
programs.subtitle: Find your path — from navigation and marine engineering to cybersecurity and artificial intelligence.

international.label: International Activities
international.title: Global Partnerships
international.description: NVNA maintains active bilateral cooperation with naval academies across multiple continents — Poland, Turkey, Romania, Italy, Greece, USA and others. The Academy is a member of the International Consortium of Military Academies with over 200 organizations from 40 countries.
international.erasmusDesc: The Erasmus+ program supports student and faculty mobility, virtual and blended learning, as well as international projects for digital and ecological transformation.

footer.brandDescription: Naval Academy — Bulgaria's oldest technical educational institution, founded in 1881. We prepare highly qualified maritime specialists and leaders.
